name: R-9 registry ships a space scale with at least four entries (space.1 space.2 space.4 space.8) per the §26 design-token shape
command: for tok in 'space.1' 'space.2' 'space.4' 'space.8'; do grep -q "^  - id: $tok\$" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/design-tokens/registry.yaml" || exit 1; done; echo ok 1>&2
